queue.title: PI vs PIL: Key Differences and the Errors That Get Them Rejected
queue.notes: Explain the difference between Package Insert and Patient Information Leaflet, SAHPRA requirements for each, common formatting and content errors, and what reviewers check first.

queue.title: The MLR Review Process: A Practical Guide for Regulatory Affairs Teams
queue.notes: What MLR review is, who should be in the room, how to structure the file, what documentation is needed, common bottlenecks and how to avoid them.

queue.title: SAHPRA Medical Device Registration: What Has Changed and What It Means for Manufacturers
queue.notes: Overview of SAHPRA's medical device registration pathway, key requirements under the MDA, ISO 13485 alignment, technical file expectations, and common gaps in applications.

queue.title: Dangerous Goods Classification Under SANS 10228: A Practical Guide for Transport Operators
queue.notes: How to correctly classify dangerous goods under SANS 10228, UN number selection, packing group assignment, common misclassifications and their consequences, SADC cross-border requirements.

queue.title: Veterinary Product Labelling in South Africa: What Act 36 of 1947 Actually Requires
queue.notes: Mandatory label elements under Act 36, withdrawal period requirements for food-producing animals, scheduling declarations, species restrictions, and common non-conformances found in practice.

queue.title: Health Claims on Consumer Products: The R146 Regulations Explained
queue.notes: What health claims are permitted under the Foodstuffs, Cosmetics and Disinfectants Act and R146 regulations, what substantiation is required, the difference between structure-function and disease claims, and how SAHPRA applies the cosmetics framework.

published.title: What SAHPRA Looks for in a Pharmaceutical Artwork Review
